channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: little-book-of/c
item.description: A concise, structured guide to the C programming language.

item.title: neuphonic/neutts-air
item.description: On-device TTS model by Neuphonic

item.title: huawei-csl/SINQ
item.description: Welcome to the official repository of SINQ! A novel, fast and high-quality quantization method designed to make any Large Language Model smaller while preserving accuracy.

item.title: safety-research/petri
item.description: An alignment auditing agent capable of quickly exploring alignment hypothesis

item.title: openai/codex-action
item.description: (no description)

item.title: MaximeRivest/maivi
item.description: Maivi - My AI Voice Input: Real-time voice-to-text local on cpu better than whisper with hotkey support

item.title: microsoft/agent-framework
item.description: A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.

item.title: showlab/Code2Video
item.description: Video generation via code

item.title: openai/chatkit-python
item.description: (no description)

item.title: openai/openai-chatkit-starter-app
item.description: Starter app to build with OpenAI ChatKit + Agent Builder

item.title: SamsungSAILMontreal/TinyRecursiveModels
item.description: (no description)

item.title: facebook/openzl
item.description: A novel data compression framework

item.title: openai/chatkit-js
item.description: (no description)

item.title: paper-design/paper-mono
item.description: (no description)

item.title: fathulfahmy/aio-usb-drive
item.description: A curated collection of useful to have programs on a multiboot USB drive

item.title: google/computer-use-preview
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
item.description: OpenStock is an open-source alternative to expensive market platforms. Track real-time prices, set personalized alerts, and explore detailed company insights — built openly, for everyone, forever free.

item.title: elevenlabs/ui
item.description: ElevenLabs UI is a component library and custom registry built on top of shadcn/ui to help you build multimodal agents faster.

item.title: mshumer/sora-extend
item.description: Generate long Sora 2 videos that exceed OpenAI's native 12-second limit

item.title: openai/openai-apps-sdk-examples
item.description: Example apps for the Apps SDK

item.title: ksdme/ut
item.description: A Rust based utilty toolbox for developers. Inspired from https://it-tools.tech

item.title: ludo-technologies/pyscn
item.description: pyscn - An Intelligent Python Code Quality Analyzer

item.title: ck-zhang/reddix
item.description: Reddix - Reddit, refined for the terminal.

item.title: MorDavid/NetworkHound
item.description: Advanced Active Directory network topology analyzer with SMB validation, multiple authentication methods (password/NTLM/Kerberos), and comprehensive network discovery. Export results as BloodHound‑compatible OpenGraph JSON.

item.title: glide-browser/glide
item.description: An extensible and keyboard-focused web browser

item.title: theNetworkChuck/n8n-terry-guide
item.description: (no description)

item.title: DebarghaG/proofofthought
item.description: "Proof of thought: Neurosymbolic program synthesis allows robust and interpretable reasoning" published Sys2Reasoning Workshop NeurIPS 2024

item.title: Esubaalew/run
item.description: Universal multi-language runner and smart REPL written in Rust.

item.title: character-ai/Ovi
item.description: (no description)

item.title: NVlabs/LongLive
item.description: LongLive: Real-time Interactive Long Video Generation

item.title: True3DLabs/WindowMode
item.description: Turn your screen into a Window into a virtual world

item.title: InkboxSoftware/spacegamex64
item.description: Recreation of a classic arcade game remade as a UEFI application for the x86_64 platform.

item.title: midudev/jscamp
item.description: Contenido y ejercicios del JSCamp InfoJobs

item.title: chiuhans111/fluidglass
item.description: (no description)
